message:
fix: add isolate to BaseModal to prevent z-index bleed-through (#5803)

* fix: add isolate to BaseModal to prevent z-index bleed-through

Console Studio (and other modals) could be overlapped by positioned
elements on the page (e.g., cluster cards) because the modal backdrop
lacked an isolation context. Adding 'isolate' creates a new stacking
context that ensures all modal content stays above page content.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix: add bonusPoints to REWARDS_FALLBACK for TypeScript build

The fallback context value was missing bonusPoints, causing TS2741
in the Docker build.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
